# NVforHD — Nevada for Huntington's Disease

> NVforHD is a Nevada non-profit that raises awareness and funds to battle Huntington's Disease through an annual charity golf tournament.

## Organisation

- **Name:** NVforHD (Nevada for HD)
- **Type:** Non-profit organisation
- **Founded:** 2024
- **Location:** Reno, Nevada
- **Event venue:** Gray's Crossing Golf Club, Truckee, CA
- **Phone:** 775-691-8860 (Sean Schaeffer, Founder)
- **Email:** info@nvforhd.com

## Mission

Every year NVforHD hosts a charity golf tournament and directs 100% of proceeds to one chosen Huntington's Disease cause — supporting treatment, awareness, or an eventual cure.

## Impact

- **$50,000+** raised in first two years
- **2024 beneficiary:** HelpCureHD — funded IVF for Brandon & Rylee Puccini, enabling an HD-free baby
- **2025 & 2026 beneficiary:** UC Davis HD Center of Excellence (Sacramento, CA)
- **90+ Northern Nevada families** served by the UC Davis HD clinic

## Annual Event

- **2026 tournament:** Friday, May 29, 2026
- **Venue:** Gray's Crossing Golf Club, Truckee, CA
- **Format:** Four-person scramble, 12PM shotgun start
- **Packages:** Foursome $880 · Single $220 · Sponsorships from $3,000
- **Book:** https://www.tripsee.travel/merchant/book/index.html?ref=2026NVforHDGolfTournament

## About Huntington's Disease

Huntington's Disease (HD) is a hereditary, fatal brain disorder with no known cure. It causes progressive breakdown of nerve cells — likened to having Parkinson's, ALS, and Alzheimer's simultaneously. Every child of an HD parent has a 50% chance of inheriting it. Approximately 1 in 10,000 people globally have HD.

## Board Members

- **Sean Schaeffer** — Founder. 30+ years in sales and customer service. CEO of publicly traded tech company. Wife Christine diagnosed with HD.
- **Mike Milligan** — Board Member. Director of Sales, Golf the High Sierra. Former President of Golf the High Sierra 2005–2014.
- **Michael R. Eskuchen** — Board Member. Account Manager, Golf the High Sierra. Former GM & COO of Hidden Valley CC, Reno.
- **John McGinnes** — Board Member. Executive Director of Sales, Atlantis Casino Resort Spa. 30 years in hotel sales.

## Partners

- [HelpCureHD](http://www.helpcurehd.com) — 2024 beneficiary. IVF funding for HD families.
- [UC Davis HD Center of Excellence](https://health.ucdavis.edu/huntingtons-disease) — 2025 & 2026 beneficiary.
